name: Tofu Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart bowl, mix flour, raisins, dates, nuts, and baking soda together.
2. In a blender or food processor, blend the remaining ingredients (tofu, egg, butter/oil, ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, vanilla) until smooth.
3. Mix wet and dry ingredients together until just combined.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes.
6. These cookies can be made ahead of time and frozen, or kept in a tin box for a few days.
